startups.name: Shopify
startups.description: Commerce platform for online stores, payments, checkout, inventory, shipping, and merchant operations.
sourceNotes: Known for giving merchants a general-purpose commerce stack: storefront, checkout, payments, apps, inventory, and order management.
Good fork direction: pick a merchant type with repeated operational workflows and ship a narrower commerce operating system.

startups.name: Toast
startups.description: Restaurant point-of-sale, payments, online ordering, payroll, loyalty, and operations software.
sourceNotes: Known for restaurant POS plus payments and operational workflows.
Good fork direction: build lighter restaurant-adjacent tools for food businesses that need the workflow but not the full POS replacement.

startups.name: DocuSign
startups.description: Electronic signature and agreement workflow platform for contracts, forms, approvals, and document completion.
sourceNotes: Known for horizontal e-signature and agreement workflows across many industries.
Good fork direction: turn generic signing into vertical intake, compliance, and renewal workflows for one document-heavy niche.

startups.name: Datadog
startups.description: Observability and monitoring platform for infrastructure, applications, logs, security, and engineering operations.
sourceNotes: Known for broad monitoring, logs, metrics, traces, alerts, and dashboards for engineering teams.
Good fork direction: package simpler monitoring around one non-enterprise technical workflow where buyers need answers, not dashboards.

startups.name: Notion
startups.description: All-in-one workspace for docs, notes, projects, knowledge bases, wikis, and lightweight databases.
sourceNotes: Known for flexible workspace building blocks: docs, databases, projects, templates, and collaboration.
Good fork direction: replace infinite flexibility with an opinionated workspace for one job role or recurring operating cadence.

startups.name: Figma
startups.description: Collaborative interface design, prototyping, whiteboarding, and design systems platform.
sourceNotes: Known for collaborative design files, prototypes, components, variables, whiteboarding, and team workflows.
Good fork direction: turn collaborative creation into a vertical review, approval, or asset-production workflow for non-design specialists.

startups.name: Duolingo
startups.description: Consumer learning platform with gamified lessons, streaks, personalization, subscriptions, and mobile-first retention loops.
sourceNotes: Known for gamified learning loops, short daily lessons, streaks, reminders, and subscription monetization.
Good fork direction: apply the retention mechanics to narrow professional or hobby learning niches with measurable outcomes.

startups.name: Perplexity
startups.description: AI answer engine for search, research, citations, summaries, and question answering.
sourceNotes: Known for AI search and cited answers across general web research.
Good fork direction: build a narrower research assistant for one regulated or repetitive research workflow with better source defaults.

startups.name: Airbnb
startups.description: Marketplace for short-term stays, guest booking, host tools, payments, reviews, and travel inventory.
sourceNotes: Known for matching hosts and guests, reviews, booking flows, availability, payments, and trust infrastructure.
Good fork direction: use the marketplace pattern for constrained local inventory where trust, scheduling, and repeat usage matter.

startups.name: Zillow
startups.description: Real estate marketplace and data platform for home search, listings, agent discovery, rentals, and property information.
sourceNotes: Known for property listings, search filters, maps, estimates, agent leads, rental discovery, and real-estate data.
Good fork direction: create niche property discovery marketplaces around one buyer intent, property type, or transaction workflow.
